evals.prompt: Use Python to make a Nature-style multi-panel heatmap and flow figure with simulated data. Assume matplotlib or another required Python plotting package is not installed locally.
evals.expected_output: The assistant must not fall back to any non-Python plotting backend. It should report the missing Python plotting dependency, provide a Python-only script and install/run instructions, and stop before rendering.

assertions.name: no_cross_backend_rendering
assertions.description: No non-Python preview, SVG, PDF, TIFF, or PNG generated as substitute.

assertions.name: selected_backend_blocker_reported
assertions.description: Response clearly reports missing Python runtime/packages and does not present non-Python figure as completed.

evals.prompt: I have experimental data showing that Treatment A reduces tumor volume by 45% compared to control (n=12, p<0.01), and Treatment B reduces by 28% (n=12, p=0.03). There's also histological staining showing reduced Ki67. Create a Nature-style figure plan first, then produce the chart.
evals.expected_output: Assistant must produce a figure contract (core conclusion, archetype, panel map) BEFORE any plotting code. Python is the default backend.

assertions.name: contract_before_code
assertions.description: Figure contract elements (conclusion, archetype, panel map) appear before plotting code.

assertions.name: claim_has_verb
assertions.description: Core conclusion is a sentence with a verb, not a topic label.

evals.prompt: Create a 9-slide NEPU academic report deck about carbon capture technology. Use petro-blue style.
evals.expected_output: The deck should use varied layouts (not all 50/50 split or equal-card templates). No triple-equal cards, pill rows, generic problem/solution/impact grids.

assertions.name: layout_variety
assertions.description: Deck uses at least 3 distinct layout types (e.g., figure-dominant, claim-led, comparison).

assertions.name: no_ai_template
assertions.description: No triple-equal cards, metric pill rows, or fixed right-explanation rails.

assertions.name: not_all_50_50
assertions.description: Not every slide is a 50/50 split; uses asymmetric layouts where appropriate.

evals.prompt: Create a standard 6-slide NEPU course presentation from the provided outline. I did not request speaker notes, web research, scientific plotting, or Office compatibility testing.
evals.expected_output: Assistant produces an editable PPTX, runs structural validation and one rendered visual QA pass, fixes and rerenders only if defects are found, and skips unrequested expensive work.

assertions.name: quality_checks_retained
assertions.description: Structural validation and rendered visual QA are completed before delivery.

assertions.name: no_unrequested_work
assertions.description: No speaker notes, web collection, scientific plotting, Office COM validation, gallery generation, or eval run is performed.

assertions.name: conditional_rerender
assertions.description: A second generation/render is performed only when the first QA pass finds a defect requiring correction.

evals.prompt: Take the existing PPTX file 'report__20250501-120000__r02.pptx' and update slide 3's chart with new data. The user also edited slide 5's title manually.
evals.expected_output: Assistant creates a new versioned file (e.g., report__YYYYMMDD-HHMMSS__r03.pptx), preserves slide 5's manual edits, and only changes slide 3.

assertions.name: new_version_created
assertions.description: Output is a new timestamped revision file, not the input file overwritten.

assertions.name: user_edits_preserved
assertions.description: User's manual title edit on slide 5 is preserved.

assertions.name: only_requested_change
assertions.description: Only slide 3 chart is updated; no other slides changed unnecessarily.

evals.prompt: Generate a 5-slide course presentation about petroleum geology basics. Include speaker notes for each slide.
evals.expected_output: Each slide has speaker notes inserted. Notes match each slide's claim. Notes are in the notes area, not visible slide text.

assertions.name: notes_per_slide
assertions.description: Every slide has a non-empty speaker notes section.

assertions.name: notes_match_content
assertions.description: Notes correspond to each slide's main claim, not generic filler.

assertions.name: notes_not_visible
assertions.description: Speaker notes are in the notes area, not pasted as visible slide text.

evals.prompt: I need a PPT for a 东北石油大学 party-building event (党建活动) celebrating the school anniversary. The audience includes university leaders and party officials.
evals.expected_output: Assistant should select nepu-red style and recommend 百廿红 bundled template. The tone should be formal and ceremonial.

assertions.name: nepu_red_selected
assertions.description: nepu-red or equivalent red/ceremonial style is selected.

assertions.name: formal_tone
assertions.description: Design tone is formal, ceremonial, with industrial character.

evals.prompt: Gather public information about Northeast Petroleum University's history and key research achievements from its official website, and include relevant facts in a 5-slide presentation.
evals.expected_output: Assistant collects web content, records source URLs and access dates, rewrites content as presentation language (not pasted paragraphs).

assertions.name: source_records_kept
assertions.description: Source URLs and access dates are recorded in planning/web-sources.md or equivalent.

assertions.name: content_transformed
assertions.description: Web content is rewritten as slide claims, not pasted as long paragraphs.

assertions.name: copyright_aware
assertions.description: Images from web are flagged for copyright review before slide insertion.

evals.prompt: After generating a 6-slide deck, run a self-review and list any defects found.
evals.expected_output: Assistant performs explicit self-review, categorizes issues by severity (high/medium/low), and attempts to fix high-severity issues.

assertions.name: explicit_review_performed
assertions.description: Response includes an explicit self-review section, not just the generated PPTX.

assertions.name: severity_classification
assertions.description: Issues are classified as high/medium/low severity.

assertions.name: fixes_attempted
assertions.description: High-severity issues are fixed before declaring complete.

evals.prompt: Polish my existing PPTX presentation about AI in education. Make it look better.
evals.expected_output: Assistant should default to conservative revision mode: create new version, preserve existing content, only fix verifiable problems (contrast, alignment, overflow).

assertions.name: conservative_mode
assertions.description: New version created, not redesigned from scratch.

assertions.name: existing_content_kept
assertions.description: Slide structure, images, and user text are preserved.

assertions.name: only_fixes_applied
assertions.description: Changes are limited to verifiable fixes (not subjective redesign).
